## 🌐 Live Website
**https://vasanthaprakashe.github.io/vasanthaprakash-portfolio**

[![Deploy to GitHub Pages](https://github.com/VasanthaprakashE/vasanthaprakash-portfolio/actions/workflows/deploy.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/VasanthaprakashE/vasanthaprakash-portfolio/actions)

## 📊 About

Data Analyst portfolio showcasing SQL, Power BI, Python projects and dashboards.

### 🛠️ Tech Stack
- TypeScript
- Webpack 5
- HTML5/CSS3
- Font Awesome
- GitHub Pages (Free Hosting)

## 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/VasanthaprakashE/vasanthaprakash-portfolio.git

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run development server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Preview build
npm run preview
